specs.section_path: 15-Layer Summary Table > 4.2 The Shape of Feeling: The Geometric Qualia Hypothesis > Confronting the Hard Problem: A Mathematical Resolution > Ψs Field Coupling Integration > The Binding Integral is H_int:
source_formulae: P0R03417: The central claim is that this interaction doesn't just transfer information or exert force; the interaction is the experience. The coupling of the universal field (Psis) to the specific, complex configuration of a brain (sigma) is what gives rise to a localised, subjective viewpoint. The unity of the Psi-field resolves the binding problem by providing a non-local medium that can simultaneously couple to all parts of the neural substrate, binding their disparate activities into a single, coherent, experiential whole. The "Hard Problem" is thus solved by positing that the fundamental interaction of the universe is experience itself.
